name: Aqua Cool
desc: Cool, translucent blue heart and round bars packed with refreshing double-mint extracts. Provides a sensory breeze that cools and revitalizes tired skin.

name: Aloe Green
desc: Deeply hydrating emerald-green translucent bars formulated with pure organic aloe vera extract. Perfect for soothing sensitive, dry, or sun-kissed skin.

name: Rose Glow
desc: Artfully sculpted rose-shaped transparent soaps infused with pure Kannauj rose water. Gently tones your skin while leaving a romantic, lingering floral scent.

name: Marigold Glow
desc: Glow-boosting golden translucent soap featuring embedded dried calendula petals and pure honey. Nourishes, heals, and enhances natural radiance.

name: Oatmeal Artisan
desc: A rustic cream soap bar elegantly embossed with 'HAND MADE'. Made with finely ground organic oats and moisturizing milk to gently buff away dry skin.

name: Potato Soap
desc: Translucent heart-shaped soap bar made with pure Potato & Aloe Vera extracts and refreshing cucumber water. Calm and cool dry skin.

name: Espresso Scrub
desc: Crafted with real organic Arabica coffee grounds and rich cocoa butter base. Buffs away dry skin and boosts circulation.

name: Cherry Cake Slice
desc: A whimsical soap bar shaped like a cake slice, infused with sweet cherry extract and moisturizing milk base.

name: Ducky Tub Soap
desc: A playful novelty duck sitting in clear blue ocean water base. Gentle and hydrating formulation safe for children.
